purpose: Verify dev/private-model-eval-rc@d4558159 honors ?privateModel=whisper-base.en and exposes correct telemetry/detail evidence.

codeUnderTest.note: Branch used only for proof. It was not merged to main.

browserProof.truth: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
browserProof.transcript: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
browserProof.detailTranscript: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.

passes: The base model selector is honored by runtime telemetry.
The selected base model produced a 100% h1_6 transcript in this injected proof.
Save/detail transcript is non-empty and matches the base transcript.
fails: The session detail page still displays Recorded with Private (whisper-tiny.en, transformers-js, browser), even though privateModelTelemetry.model is whisper-base.en.
result.nextDevAsk: Persist/display the selected private model identity so detail/history/export/analytics show whisper-base.en when base was used. Do not mark the human/base proof green until detail and telemetry agree.
